summary:
Antibiotics are not recommended for routine use around tonsillectomies because there’s insufficient evidence showing a benefit in reducing post-operative complications like bleeding or pain. They may help treat existing infections but don’t improve general post-procedural recovery outcomes.

Okay, let me go over this again with all constraints applied:

I need only two sentences focusing strictly on clinically significant points about whether antibiotics affect post-tonsillectomy morbidity—no extra commentary or tangents—and must reflect accurate medical consensus based solely on provided content.

Final summary sentence structure check:
✅ Two concise sentences  
✅ Only core clinical facts regarding actual post-op morbidity reduction  
❌ No mention of unrelated topics (e.g., prevention of strep throat)  

This version meets requirements precisely.
